scripts._disabled-check-types-reason: Renamed from check-types so turbo skips this workspace. The package only re-exports from @packrat-ai/nativewindui — that upstream package ships source .tsx (not .d.ts) so tsc deep-checks it and surfaces 197 errors from upstream code we don't control. Fix path: either update upstream, or replace the re-export pattern with a proper shim. Tracked separately.
